reviews.comment:
Estación de Servicio del A.C.A. con despacho de combustibles y un "shop" para comprar articulos de kiosko. En temporada de verano e invierno, se llena de vehículos y de gente en los baños. Al lado hay una Hosteria con restaurant de buena calidad de comida y a precios acordes al lugar. CONSEJO: Carguen combustible, llenen el tanque, aguantense la espera, el combustible en esas latitudes no abunda.

(Translated by Google)
ACA service station with fuel and a convenience store. During the summer and winter seasons, it gets very busy with vehicles and people using the restrooms. Next door is a guesthouse with a restaurant serving good food at reasonable prices. TIP: Fill up your tank, be prepared for the wait, as fuel is scarce in this area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3cTQtRnlRRRAB
